user_request:
I want to create a table tracking AI companies that are actively hiring.

Columns needed:
- Company Name
- Website
- Is hiring for AI roles? (yes/no)
- Team size (approximate)
- Recent funding (last round)

Find about 10 companies across different AI sectors like research, healthcare, and enterprise.
Make sure to include both established companies and startups.

columns.name: Company Name
columns.description: Official name of the AI company or organization

columns.name: Website
columns.description: Official company website URL where company information and careers page can be accessed

columns.name: Is Hiring for AI Roles?
columns.description: Confirmation of whether the company is actively recruiting for AI-related positions (research, engineering, product, etc.). Should be verified through current job postings on their careers page or major job boards.
columns.validation_strategy: Check company careers page for open AI positions. Search job boards (LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor) for recent postings from this company with keywords: 'AI', 'machine learning', 'deep learning', 'NLP', 'computer vision', 'AI engineer', 'ML researcher'. Verify postings are dated within the last 30 days to confirm active hiring.

columns.name: Team Size (Approximate)
columns.description: Estimated total number of employees at the company. Provide a range or specific number if available. Note whether this is global headcount or specific to AI/ML division if applicable.
columns.validation_strategy: Check company website 'About' section, LinkedIn company page (employee count), Crunchbase, or recent news articles. For startups, note if pre-Series A, Series A-C, or later stage. For established companies, use LinkedIn employee count or official company statements. Provide range if exact number unavailable (e.g., '50-100 employees' or '5,000+ employees').

columns.name: Recent Funding (Last Round)
columns.description: Most recent funding round information including round type (seed, Series A/B/C, etc.), amount raised, date of funding, and lead investors if available. For established public companies, note 'Public Company' instead.
columns.validation_strategy: Search Crunchbase, PitchBook, or company press releases for most recent funding announcement. Include round designation (e.g., 'Series B: $50M, Q3 2024') and lead investor names. For public companies, note 'Public Company' with stock ticker if applicable. Verify funding date is within the last 24 months for relevance.

columns.name: AI Sector Focus
columns.description: Primary sector or domain where the company applies AI technology. Categorize as: Research (foundational AI/ML research), Healthcare (medical AI, biotech), Enterprise (business software, productivity), or Other (specify domain).
columns.validation_strategy: Review company mission statement, product descriptions, and job postings to determine primary AI application area. Classify into Research (if focused on foundational models, research labs), Healthcare (if focused on medical/biotech applications), Enterprise (if focused on business/productivity tools), or Other. Note if company operates across multiple sectors.

columns.name: Company Stage
columns.description: Classification of company maturity: Startup (pre-Series B), Growth Stage (Series B-D), Established (Series E+), or Public Company. Helps distinguish between emerging and mature organizations.
columns.validation_strategy: Determine based on funding history, employee count, and market presence. Startups typically have <100 employees and Series A-B funding. Growth stage companies have Series B-D funding and 100-500+ employees. Established companies have Series E+ or are public. Cross-reference with Crunchbase and LinkedIn data.

search_strategy.description: Find AI companies actively hiring across research, healthcare, and enterprise sectors, including both established companies and startups with demonstrated hiring momentum

subdomains.name: AI Research & Foundational Model Companies
subdomains.focus: Companies focused on foundational AI research, large language models, and core AI/ML research with active hiring for researchers and engineers
search_queries: AI research companies hiring 2025 OpenAI Anthropic DeepMind
large language model companies recruiting AI researchers
foundational AI model startups hiring engineers

subdomains.name: Healthcare & Biotech AI Companies
subdomains.focus: Companies applying AI to healthcare, medical imaging, drug discovery, and biotech with active recruitment for AI/ML talent
search_queries: medical AI startups recruiting machine learning engineers
biotech AI drug discovery companies job openings
clinical AI and medical imaging companies hiring

subdomains.name: Enterprise AI & Business Software Companies
subdomains.focus: Established and emerging companies building AI-powered enterprise software, productivity tools, and business applications with AI hiring
search_queries: business intelligence AI companies job openings
enterprise SaaS AI companies hiring engineers

subdomains.name: AI Infrastructure & Platform Companies
subdomains.focus: Companies building AI infrastructure, MLOps platforms, and AI development tools with active hiring for engineers and researchers
search_queries: AI development tools companies job openings

search_strategy.user_context:
I want to create a table tracking AI companies that are actively hiring.

Columns needed:
- Company Name
- Website
- Is hiring for AI roles? (yes/no)
- Team size (approximate)
- Recent funding (last round)

Find about 10 companies across different AI sectors like research, healthcare, and enterprise.
Make sure to include both established companies and startups.
search_strategy.table_purpose: Find AI companies actively hiring across research, healthcare, and enterprise sectors, including both established companies and startups with demonstrated hiring momentum

final_rows.match_rationale: OpenAI is a leading AI research and enterprise software company, actively hiring for a wide range of AI roles, with recent high-profile funding and a clear focus on business applications and productivity tools.
DeepMind, now merged with Google Brain, is a prominent AI research lab with ongoing hiring for AI researchers.
Anthropic is a startup focused on AI research and foundational models, actively hiring for AI roles.
Scale AI is a startup involved in AI research and development, with active hiring for AI engineers.
Insilico Medicine is a leading AI drug discovery company actively involved in using AI for pharmaceutical research and development, with recent funding and hiring momentum.

Dataiku is a prominent enterprise AI and business intelligence platform, recognized for active hiring in AI engineering and data science roles, serving large organizations with AI-powered analytics and automation solutions.

Lambda is a specialized AI infrastructure company providing GPU cloud services for deep learning, actively hiring for engineering and research roles to support its platform for AI model training and deployment, matching the subdomain focus on AI infrastructure and active hiring[1].

all_candidates_full_list.match_rationale: OpenAI is a leading AI research company actively hiring for foundational AI model development, particularly with its partnership with Microsoft.
DeepMind, now merged with Google Brain, is a prominent AI research lab with ongoing hiring for AI researchers.
Anthropic is a startup focused on AI research and foundational models, actively hiring for AI roles.
Scale AI is a startup involved in AI research and development, with active hiring for AI engineers.
Insilico Medicine is a leading AI drug discovery company actively involved in using AI for pharmaceutical research and development, with recent funding and hiring momentum.
Tempus is a healthcare AI company focused on precision medicine and patient care, actively hiring for AI roles.
PathAI is a healthcare AI company specializing in clinical trial support and AI model training, though recent hiring activity is less clear.

OpenAI is a leading AI research and enterprise software company, actively hiring for a wide range of AI roles, with recent high-profile funding and a clear focus on business applications and productivity tools.

Dataiku is a prominent enterprise AI and business intelligence platform, recognized for active hiring in AI engineering and data science roles, serving large organizations with AI-powered analytics and automation solutions.

Lambda is a specialized AI infrastructure company providing GPU cloud services for deep learning, actively hiring for engineering and research roles to support its platform for AI model training and deployment, matching the subdomain focus on AI infrastructure and active hiring[1].
